title: selaginella radiata
intro: Selaginella radiata, also known as the 'Rainbow Plant', is a type of vascular cryptogam, a group of plants that reproduce via spores rather than seeds. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Selaginella radiata include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory health, and even exhibit antitumor activities. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
